ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Et Academiae Curiosorum Germaniae, Recuperatorum Patavii, Incitatorum Faventiae, et Colleg. Dissertatio de Iatro=Physicis Ferrariensibus, qui Medicinam Scriptis suis exornaverunt.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: A short bibliographical essay on Ferrarese physician writers.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
